articles.title: WHY EVERYONE'S SWITCHING TO AI CREDITS
articles.summary: AI companies are shifting to credit-based pricing to balance rising costs and uneven usage. Credits offer flexibility and value alignment, but success depends on clear, fair, and trusted implementation.

articles.title: HOW TO HANDLE VISIONARY LEADERS WITHOUT LOSING THE TEAM
articles.summary: Visionary leaders drive bold ideas but risk disruption. Progress depends on translating vision into action, protecting focus, and channeling their energy into productive execution.

articles.title: AI PM MASTERY IS A RARE SKILL
articles.summary: AI product management is new and requires unique skills that few possess. The only way to learn is by building.

articles.title: WHY "'NO' IS A COMPLETE SENTENCE" IS DANGEROUS ADVICE
articles.summary: “No” may set boundaries, but delivered bluntly, it risks damaging workplace relationships. Adding context, trade-offs, or alternatives makes refusals collaborative, protecting boundaries while keeping trust and teamwork intact.

articles.title: HOW TO MAKE YOUR WRITING CRISP
articles.summary: The CRISP framework (Context, Requirements, Insights, Solutions, Proof) turns complex decisions into clear strategy documents. Writing in long form improves both communication and strategic thinking.

articles.title: PRODUCT ROADMAP EXAMPLES
articles.summary: Strong roadmaps tell a story, connecting initiatives to objectives and outcomes. They move beyond feature lists, balancing near-term focus with long-term strategy and clear alignment.

articles.title: YOUR CORPORATE EXPERIENCE IS STARTUP CURRENCY
articles.summary: Corporate PM skills translate into startup strengths when reframed around customers, constraints, and smart bets. Lean practice builds evidence of readiness and unlocks competitive advantage.

articles.title: WHY ARE WE ORGANIZED LIKE THIS?
articles.summary: Organizations often follow one of nine patterns: political turf wars, buzzword-driven fads, organic evolution, pendulum swings, constant reorgs, founder dominance, founder philosophy, disciplined management, or gradual, thoughtful transformation. Each requires different strategies for survival, growth, and adaptation.

articles.title: WHY CONFETTI CELEBRATIONS BACKFIRE (AND HOW TO MAKE THEM WORK)
articles.summary: Celebrations must align with user goals to feel meaningful.

articles.title: CHASE ENVIRONMENTS THAT MAKE YOUR GOALS INEVITABLE
articles.summary: Outcomes often depend more on environment than effort.
